overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a female explorer navigating through a dark cave system at night, emerging to a campfire area, and proceeding through a rocky canyon with a waterfall. The character climbs vertical rock faces and traverses ledges in a mountainous wilderness environment with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark cave storage chamber with wooden crates

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark cave passage lined with wooden storage crates and barrels

entered.detail: stacked wooden storage crates lining the cave walls
cylindrical wooden barrels grouped near the cave wall
rough rocky cave walls with exposed roots and stones
faint light visible at the distant cave exit

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a dark, enclosed cave storage area filled with wooden crates and barrels. The environment is dimly lit with rough stone walls and a visible exit light in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky overhang with campfire at cave exit

events.description: exits dark cave into semi-open rocky area with burning campfire
firelight illuminates the scene as character approaches the cave exit

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cave exit past a burning campfire and under a rocky overhang

entered.detail: burning fire with orange flames and smoke near the cave exit
large natural stone archway marking the cave exit
rock ceiling extending over the campfire area

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark cave into a semi-covered rocky area with a burning campfire. The lighting shifts from darkness to warm firelight as the character approaches a large stone archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path leading to waterfall

events.description: leaves campfire shelter and enters narrow rocky canyon under night sky

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow canyon passage toward a distant waterfall visible ahead

entered.detail: waterfall visible in the distance between canyon walls
tall rocky canyon walls on both sides of the path
scattered pine trees visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon under the night sky, with tall cliff walls on both sides and a waterfall visible in the distance. Sparse vegetation and trees appear along the canyon edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfall base with pool and climbing rocks

events.description: character stops at waterfall base and looks upward at the water flow

agents.ego_description: standing at the waterfall base looking up at the water flow and assessing climbable rocks

entered.detail: pool of water at the base of the waterfall
large moss-covered boulders surrounding the pool
vines and roots hanging from rocks near the waterfall

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the waterfall base, standing near the pool surrounded by large boulders and hanging vegetation. The waterfall dominates the center of the frame as the character pauses to look upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical rock climbing section with ledges

events.description: begins climbing up rock face and ledges away from the waterfall
light snow or ash particles begin falling from the sky

agents.ego_description: climbing up rock ledges and scrambling over boulders to gain elevation

entered.detail: climbable rock ledges and handholds on the canyon wall
wooden beams or bridge structure attached to the rocks

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the rock face using ledges and handholds, moving away from the waterfall base. A wooden structure appears on the left attached to the rocks, and snow begins to fall as the character climbs higher.

agents.ego_description: traversing high ledges and jumping across gaps in the snowy upper canyon

entered.detail: white snow particles falling through the air
tall vertical canyon walls at higher elevation

segments.scene_description: The character traverses high rock ledges in the upper canyon while snow falls gently. The environment features exposed rock platforms and gaps requiring jumps, with the waterfall now far below and out of sight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that leads from the claustrophobic depths of a dark cave into a vast, snowy mountain canyon. It begins within a dimly lit storage area filled with wooden crates and barrels, moving toward a distant light that opens into a semi-covered rocky area illuminated by the warm glow of a campfire. As the character passes through a large stone archway, the scene expands into a narrow canyon under a night sky, where the camera follows the path past sparse vegetation toward a towering waterfall. Upon reaching the base of the falls, the perspective shifts upward as the character ascends vertical rock faces and wooden structures, while the air begins to fill with falling snow. The journey finally culminates on high, exposed rock ledges, leaving the waterfall far below as the camera traverses a frozen landscape of stone platforms and gaps.
